posts.text:
Podcast teams automate drafts but handle approvals manually. Editorial judgment and exception handling are where automation fails. What's your line?

Episode 14 with Maya Chen: https://creators.example.com/guests/maya-chen

The transcript is input, not final truth. Raw transcripts have filler and unverified references—useful for drafts, dangerous for claims. Humans own what goes live. Automation accelerates, not abdicates.

Episode 14 with Maya Chen: https://creators.example.com/guests/maya-chen
